name: SAM.gov Contract Opportunities
notes: Federal opportunity board. Public API documented at api.sam.gov. SAM.gov vendor registration is a prerequisite to submit a federal bid but not to read postings. Ingestion is implemented via tools/ingest_sam.py; bid submission remains manual.

name: Texas ESBD / Texas SmartBuy
notes: State opportunity board. No public API; rely on saved searches and weekly review.

name: Texas CMBL
notes: Vendor profile and NIGP commodity codes feed downstream Texas agency notifications. Maintain commodity selections and contact email here.

name: Oklahoma OMES Central Purchasing
notes: Oklahoma Office of Management and Enterprise Services (OMES) Central Purchasing. Open solicitations are posted publicly on the OMES solicitations page (public search utility); register in the Oklahoma Supplier Portal to receive commodity-based notifications and to respond. Bid submission remains manual.

name: Louisiana LaPAC
notes: LaPAC (Louisiana Procurement and Contract Network), the Office of State Procurement bid board (Division of Administration). Open bids are searchable publicly; email notifications require LaGov supplier self-registration (subscription). Bid submission remains manual.

name: Mississippi MAGIC Supplier Portal
notes: Mississippi Department of Finance and Administration (DFA). Procurement runs through MAGIC (Mississippi Accountability System for Government Information and Collaboration); the public bid search is at ms.gov/dfa/contract_bid_search. Register in MAGIC Supplier Self-Service (SUS) for RFx notifications by product category. Bid submission remains manual.

name: Arkansas ARBuy
notes: Arkansas Office of State Procurement (Department of Shared Administrative Services) eProcurement system, ARBuy. Free vendor registration; suppliers receive solicitation notifications and respond through the system. Bid submission remains manual.

name: New Mexico State Purchasing Division
notes: New Mexico General Services Department (GSD), State Purchasing Division (SPD). NOTE: outside Continental's currently documented five-state service geography (TX/OK/LA/MS/AR); added per operator request. As of 2026-06-29 new solicitations post exclusively in the Euna/Bonfire NM-SPD Procurement Portal (generalservices-state-nm-us.bonfirehub.com); the prior eProNM portal runs through 2026-06-22. Register in the new portal for notifications. Bid submission remains manual.

name: City of Houston Beacon Bid
notes: City of Houston electronic bidding portal. Supplier registration via SAP Business Network; commodity-based notifications managed in Beacon Bid.

name: Harris County Bonfire
notes: Harris County opportunity portal. Free vendor registration. High-fit categories include jail, public health, facilities.

name: Walker County TX Bonfire
notes: Walker County, Texas procurement portal. Verified 2026-06-21: official county site Vendor Registration link points to co-walker-tx.bonfirehub.com, not DemandStar. Bonfire RSS feed is configured in configs/feeds.json and returned a valid empty Open Public Opportunities feed; public API returned projects: []. Register on Bonfire for commodity notifications and monitor the RSS for jail, detention, mattress, bedding, shelter, cot, and institutional furniture terms.

name: Houston ISD IonWave
notes: Houston Independent School District procurement portal. Email notifications driven by selected commodity categories.

name: The University of Texas System
notes: System-level Contracts and Procurement office. Individual UT campuses (UT Austin, UT Arlington, UT Dallas, UT San Antonio, UT El Paso, UT Rio Grande Valley, plus health institutions) post solicitations through their own campus purchasing offices; register at the campus level for bid notifications.

name: The Texas A&M University System
notes: System-level procurement landing. Verified 2026-06-21: AggieBid public events board is https://bids.sciquest.com/apps/Router/PublicEvent?CustomerOrg=TAMU and the AggieBuy/AggieBid supplier portal is https://solutions.sciquest.com/apps/Router/SupplierLogin?CustOrg=TAMU. Campus/system solicitations post through AggieBid or campus-specific purchasing offices; register in AggieBuy/AggieBid and at campuses where separate portals exist.

name: University of Houston
notes: UH main-campus Purchasing Department. UH System institutions (UH-Downtown, UH-Clear Lake, UH-Victoria) run separate purchasing offices; the UH-System office coordinates but bid postings are at the campus level.

name: BidNet Direct - Texas Purchasing Group
notes: BidNet local-agency aggregator. Verified 2026-06-21: Texas Purchasing Group public page invites vendors to register for local-government RFPs, bids, and awards and showed 2,302 statewide/federal open solicitations plus 78 group bids. Vendor registration provides real-time notifications of matching bids. Keyword result pages returned 403 to automated fetches; verify mattress/bedding/dormitory/correctional saved searches after login.

name: BidNet Direct - Oklahoma Purchasing Group
notes: BidNet local-agency aggregator for Oklahoma counties, cities, schools, and other local agencies. BidNet footer lists Oklahoma Purchasing Group; direct automated fetch of the Oklahoma page returned 403 on 2026-06-21. Register/login to verify open opportunities and configure mattress/bedding/dormitory/correctional saved-search alerts.

name: BuyBoard
notes: Cooperative purchasing program operated by the Texas Association of School Boards (TASB), serving Texas public-sector members (ISDs, municipalities, counties). Vendor participation is via BuyBoard's RFP process; once awarded, vendors sell directly to BuyBoard members under the cooperative contract.

name: Choice Partners
notes: Texas-headquartered national cooperative operated by Harris County Department of Education. Vendor participation is via Choice Partners RFP; awarded contracts are available to public-sector members nationwide. Verified 2026-06-21: supplier registration runs through HCDE eBid/IonWave at hcdeebid.ionwave.net/VendorRegistration.aspx; commodity selections drive bid notifications. Current public sweep found no open mattress/bed/dormitory product-fit RFP; the next Furniture, Fixtures, Equipment (FFE) and Related Items cycle is listed with estimated advertise date 2027-06-01.

name: TIPS
notes: The Interlocal Purchasing System, a national cooperative operated by Region 8 Education Service Center (Pittsburg, TX). Vendor participation is via TIPS RFP; awarded contracts are available to TIPS members (public agencies, ISDs, higher-ed, non-profits) nationwide.

name: HGACBuy
notes: Houston-Galveston Area Council cooperative purchasing program. Strong fit for Gulf Coast public entities. Vendor participation is via HGACBuy RFP; awarded contracts are available to H-GAC members.

name: Sourcewell
notes: Sourcewell (formerly NJPA) is a Minnesota local unit of government operating a national cooperative procurement program. Vendor participation is via nationally advertised Sourcewell solicitations through the Sourcewell procurement portal (proportal.sourcewell-mn.gov); awarded vendors sell to Sourcewell-member public-sector entities nationwide under the cooperative contract. Verified 2026-06-21: open solicitations had no mattress/bed/dormitory/furniture product fit. Current contract list shows Furniture Solutions with Related Accessories and Services contract family 091423 maturing 2027-12-04; KI contract 091423-KII explicitly includes dormitory and library furniture.

name: OMNIA Partners
notes: National cooperative formed from the 2019 merger of National IPA and US Communities. Member entities buy under awarded cooperative contracts; vendor participation is via OMNIA's lead-agency RFPs (a public agency runs a competitive procurement and the resulting contract is made available cooperatively).

name: E&I Cooperative Services
notes: Member-owned sourcing cooperative dedicated to education. Verified 2026-06-21: supplier registration uses E&I Supplier Management Portal and suppliers should monitor current/upcoming RFP solicitations in SciQuest (CustomerOrg=EandICooperative). Contract Navigator lists Office & Classroom, Interiors coverage including Student Residential/Dorm Furniture and active University Sleep Products mattress contract EI00071 / RFP 683486 through 2031-01-31. Registration alone does not create awarded-partner status; suppliers must respond to an applicable RFP and be awarded.
